output.final_deliverable:
1. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Main_Page
2. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/History_of_Wikipedia
3. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia:Vital_articles
4. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Linux
Adjacency verification: The page on 'History of Wikipedia' links to 'Wikipedia:Vital articles', confirming the connection between URLs 2 and 3.
output.action_summary: The chain starts at the Wikipedia Main Page, then goes to the page on the history of Wikipedia, which links to the Vital articles, and from there to the Linux page. The connection between 'History of Wikipedia' and 'Vital articles' is verified by the link on the 'History of Wikipedia' page.

8bf3dda7-51a1-47d8-8d46-4d79485c8c2d.title: Start at https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Main_Page and build a chain of at least 4 Wikipedia URLs.

steps: Search for the Wikipedia main page to confirm current URL structure.
Visit https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Main_Page and extract links to other Wikipedia articles.
Select a link from the main page to another Wikipedia article. Visit this new page and extract links again.
Repeat the process to find a third and fourth Wikipedia article URL, each time verifying that the previous page links to the next one.
Identify and record a pair of adjacent URLs in the chain to verify the linkage.
Compile the chain of four URLs in order, ensuring each link is verified by page content.
details.action: Sequentially search for the main page, visit it, find links to other Wikipedia pages, select a link, visit it, and repeat to create a chain of 4 Wikipedia URLs. Verify adjacency relationships by examining links on each page.
